headline: Will Darden’s (DRI) Raised 2026 Sales Outlook and Buyback Shift Its Investment Narrative?
summary: Darden Restaurants reported past third-quarter fiscal 2026 results with sales of US$3,345.3 million, net income of US$306.8 million, and slightly lower earnings per share compared with a year earlier. Despite the softer quarterly profit, Darden raised its fiscal 2026 sales outlook, affirmed a US$1.50 dividend, and completed a US$483.46 million buyback, underscoring management’s confidence in its restaurants’ performance and guest demand. Next, we’ll examine how Darden’s raised full-year...
